escalation.rationale: Trump threatens Iran power plant strikes on Tuesday deadline while US-Israeli air campaign continues with synagogue hit in Tehran.

ticker_items: Trump threatens Iran power plant strikes by Tuesday deadline
US-Israeli projectile hits Tehran synagogue amid ongoing bombing campaign
Russia downs 148 Ukrainian drones in 3-hour period
Israel pushes deeper into southern Lebanon since March 2 escalation
Strait of Hormuz remains blocked as 40-nation talks convene

eastern_europe.description: Ukrainian drone swarm of 148 units intercepted by Russian air defenses over three-hour period.

middle_east.description: US-Israeli projectile strikes synagogue in Tehran causing extensive damage.
Israeli airstrikes claim at least 15 lives as forces push deeper into southern Lebanon.

claimed_totals.figure: 2,076 dead in Iran, 26 in Israel, 13 US soldiers, 28 in Gulf states

middle_east.text: Tuesday will be power plant day
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Foreign Minister Fidan met with Syrian President al-Sharaa and Ukrainian President Zelensky in Damascus. Turkey continues diplomatic efforts amid regional escalation.
Britain convened virtual summit with 40 countries to explore reopening the Strait of Hormuz. UK preparing for UNIFIL withdrawal from Lebanon next year.
Two Qatari LNG tankers attempting first exit through Strait of Hormuz since Iran war began. Qatar maintaining energy exports despite regional tensions.

financial.notes: Global oil prices climbing as Strait of Hormuz remains effectively blocked by Iran during ongoing conflict.

update_log.text: Trump threatens Iran power plant strikes by Tuesday deadline in vulgar social media post
US-Israeli projectile strikes synagogue in Tehran causing extensive damage according to Mehr News
Political analyst says Iran has rejected US ceasefire deal citing American and Israeli track record
Israeli airstrikes in Lebanon claim at least 15 lives as forces push deeper into southern regions
